parameters.query:
SELECT
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_delivery_mode' THEN value END) AS email_delivery_mode,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_test_recipient' THEN value END) AS email_test_recipient,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_sender_name' THEN value END) AS email_sender_name,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_reply_to' THEN value END) AS email_reply_to,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'email_signature_template_key' THEN value END) AS email_signature_template_key,
  MAX(CASE WHEN key = 'n8n_base_url' THEN value END) AS n8n_base_url
FROM public.global_settings
WHERE key IN ('email_delivery_mode', 'email_test_recipient', 'email_sender_name', 'email_reply_to', 'email_signature_template_key', 'n8n_base_url');

parameters.jsCode:
const input = $input.first().json ?? {};
const sqlLiteral = (value) => "'" + String(value ?? '').replace(/'/g, "''") + "'";
const summaryCte = [
  'summary AS (',
  '  SELECT',
  '    count(*)::int AS total_cases,',
  "    count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'New')::int AS new_cases,",
  "    count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'In Progress')::int AS in_progress_cases,",
  "    count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'Waiting')::int AS waiting_cases,",
  "    count(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'Completed')::int AS completed_cases",
  '  FROM public.cases',
  ')',
].join('\n');
const scopeFilter = input.status_filter
  ? 'TRUE'
  : (input.scope === 'completed' ? "c.status = 'Completed'" : (input.scope === 'all' ? 'TRUE' : "c.status <> 'Completed'"));
const statusFilter = input.status_filter ? `c.status = ${sqlLiteral(input.status_filter)}` : 'TRUE';
const priorityFilter = input.priority_filter ? `c.priority = ${sqlLiteral(input.priority_filter)}` : 'TRUE';
const qSql = sqlLiteral(input.q || '');
const caseIdSql = input.case_id ? sqlLiteral(input.case_id) : 'NULL';
const selectedTemplateSql = sqlLiteral(input.selected_template_key || '');
let sql = '';

if (input.view === 'dashboard') {
  sql = [
    'WITH',
    summaryCte + ',',
    'case_rows AS (',
    '  SELECT',
    '    c.id,',
    '    c.title,',
    '    c.contact_name,',
    '    c.contact_email,',
    '    c.contact_phone,',
    '    c.status,',
    '    c.priority,',
    '    c.source,',
    '    c.notes,',
    '    c.created_at,',
    '    c.updated_at,',
    '    c.last_inbound_at,',
    '    c.last_outbound_at,',
    '    COALESCE(last_event.activity_at, c.updated_at, c.created_at) AS last_activity_at,',
    '    last_event.direction AS last_activity_direction,',
    '    last_event.subject AS last_activity_subject,',
    '    last_event.preview AS last_activity_preview,',
    '    last_event.recipient_summary AS last_activity_recipient,',
    '    counts.activity_count',
    '  FROM public.cases c',
    '  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (',
    '    SELECT',
    '      ce.direction,',
    '      ce.subject,',
    "      LEFT(regexp_replace(COALESCE(ce.body_text, regexp_replace(COALESCE(ce.body_html, ''), '<[^>]+>', ' ', 'g')), '\\s+', ' ', 'g'), 180) AS preview,",
    '      COALESCE(ce.sent_at, ce.created_at) AS activity_at,',
    "      COALESCE(ce.recipients ->> 'to', ce.recipients ->> 'from', '') AS recipient_summary",
    '    FROM public.case_emails ce',
    '    WHERE ce.case_id = c.id',
    '    ORDER BY COALESCE(ce.sent_at, ce.created_at) DESC, ce.created_at DESC',
    '    LIMIT 1',
    '  ) last_event ON TRUE',
    '  LEFT JOIN LATERAL (',
    '    SELECT count(*)::int AS activity_count',
    '    FROM public.case_emails ce',
    '    WHERE ce.case_id = c.id',
    '  ) counts ON TRUE',
    '  WHERE ' + scopeFilter,
    '    AND ' + statusFilter,
    '    AND ' + priorityFilter,
    "    AND (" + qSql + " = '' OR c.title ILIKE '%' || " + qSql + " || '%' OR c.contact_name ILIKE '%' || " + qSql + " || '%' OR COALESCE(c.contact_email, '') ILIKE '%' || " + qSql + " || '%' OR COALESCE(c.notes, '') ILIKE '%' || " + qSql + " || '%')",
    '  ORDER BY COALESCE(last_event.activity_at, c.updated_at, c.created_at) DESC',
    '  LIMIT 80',
    ')',
    'SELECT',
    '  (SELECT row_to_json(summary) FROM summary) AS summary,',
    "  COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(to_jsonb(case_rows)) FROM case_rows), '[]'::json) AS case_rows",
  ].join('\n');
} else if (input.view === 'case') {
  sql = [
    'WITH',
    summaryCte + ',',
    'selected_case AS (',
    '  SELECT * FROM public.cases WHERE id = ' + caseIdSql + '::uuid',
    '),',
    'activity_rows AS (',
    '  SELECT',
    '    ce.id,',
    '    ce.direction,',
    '    ce.subject,',
    '    ce.body_html,',
    '    ce.body_text,',
    '    ce.template_key,',
    '    ce.signature_template_key,',
    '    ce.delivery_mode,',
    '    ce.recipients,',
    '    ce.gmail_message_id,',
    '    ce.gmail_thread_id,',
    '    ce.created_by,',
    '    COALESCE(ce.sent_at, ce.created_at) AS activity_at',
    '  FROM public.case_emails ce',
    '  JOIN selected_case sc ON sc.id = ce.case_id',
    '  ORDER BY COALESCE(ce.sent_at, ce.created_at) DESC, ce.created_at DESC',
    '  LIMIT 100',
    '),',
    'message_templates AS (',
    "  SELECT template_key, COALESCE(NULLIF(template_name, ''), template_key) AS template_name",
    '  FROM public.email_templates',
    '  WHERE template_type = 0 AND is_active = true',
    "  ORDER BY COALESCE(NULLIF(template_name, ''), template_key)",
    '),',
    'signature_templates AS (',
    "  SELECT template_key, COALESCE(NULLIF(template_name, ''), template_key) AS template_name",
    '  FROM public.email_templates',
    '  WHERE template_type = 2 AND is_active = true',
    "  ORDER BY COALESCE(NULLIF(template_name, ''), template_key)",
    ')',
    'SELECT',
    '  (SELECT row_to_json(summary) FROM summary) AS summary,',
    "  COALESCE((SELECT to_jsonb(selected_case) FROM selected_case), '{}'::jsonb) AS case_row,",
    "  COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(to_jsonb(activity_rows)) FROM activity_rows), '[]'::json) AS activity_rows,",
    "  COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(to_jsonb(message_templates)) FROM message_templates), '[]'::json) AS message_templates,",
    "  COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(to_jsonb(signature_templates)) FROM signature_templates), '[]'::json) AS signature_templates",
  ].join('\n');
} else if (input.view === 'contacts') {
  sql = [
    'WITH',
    summaryCte + ',',
    'member_rollup AS (',
    '  SELECT',
    `    trim(concat_ws(' ', rm."First name", rm."Last name")) AS contact_name,`,
    `    string_agg(DISTINCT rm."Membership", ', ' ORDER BY rm."Membership") AS memberships`,
    '  FROM public.raw_members rm',
    '  WHERE COALESCE(rm.is_current, true) = true',
    '  GROUP BY 1',
    '),',
    'matches AS (',
    '  SELECT',
    '    c.contact_id,',
    '    c.payer_name AS contact_name,',
    '    c.email_address,',
    '    c.mobile_number,',
    '    c.phone_number,',
    '    c.address_1,',
    '    c.town,',
    '    c.postcode,',
    '    c.venue_id,',
    '    c.member_status,',
    '    c.quality_score,',
    '    mr.memberships',
    '  FROM public.vw_best_current_contacts c',
    '  LEFT JOIN member_rollup mr ON mr.contact_name = c.payer_name',
    "  WHERE (" + qSql + " = '' OR c.payer_name ILIKE '%' || " + qSql + " || '%' OR COALESCE(c.email_address, '') ILIKE '%' || " + qSql + " || '%' OR COALESCE(c.mobile_number, '') ILIKE '%' || " + qSql + " || '%' OR COALESCE(c.venue_id, '') ILIKE '%' || " + qSql + " || '%')",
    "  ORDER BY CASE WHEN " + qSql + " = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, c.quality_score DESC, c.payer_name",
    '  LIMIT 40',
    ')',
    'SELECT',
    '  (SELECT row_to_json(summary) FROM summary) AS summary,',
    "  COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(to_jsonb(matches)) FROM matches), '[]'::json) AS contact_rows",
  ].join('\n');
} else if (input.view === 'signatures') {
  sql = [
    'WITH',
    summaryCte + ',',
    'signature_rows AS (',
    '  SELECT',
    '    template_key,',
    "    COALESCE(NULLIF(template_name, ''), template_key) AS template_name,",
    '    text_template,',
    '    html_template,',
    '    updated_at,',
    '    is_active',
    '  FROM public.email_templates',
    '  WHERE template_type = 2',
    "  ORDER BY is_active DESC, COALESCE(NULLIF(template_name, ''), template_key)",
    '),',
    'selected_signature AS (',
    '  SELECT * FROM signature_rows',
    "  WHERE template_key = COALESCE(NULLIF(" + selectedTemplateSql + ", ''), (SELECT template_key FROM signature_rows LIMIT 1))",
    '  LIMIT 1',
    ')',
    'SELECT',
    '  (SELECT row_to_json(summary) FROM summary) AS summary,',
    "  COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(to_jsonb(signature_rows)) FROM signature_rows), '[]'::json) AS signature_rows,",
    "  COALESCE((SELECT to_jsonb(selected_signature) FROM selected_signature), '{}'::jsonb) AS selected_signature",
  ].join('\n');
} else {
  sql = [
    'WITH',
    summaryCte + ',',
    'setting_rows AS (',
    '  SELECT',
    '    key.key,',
    "    COALESCE(gs.value, '') AS value,",
    "    COALESCE(gs.description, '') AS description",
    '  FROM (VALUES',
    "    ('email_delivery_mode'),",
    "    ('email_test_recipient'),",
    "    ('email_sender_name'),",
    "    ('email_reply_to'),",
    "    ('email_signature_template_key'),",
    "    ('n8n_base_url')",
    '  ) AS key(key)',
    '  LEFT JOIN public.global_settings gs ON gs.key = key.key',
    '),',
    'signature_rows AS (',
    "  SELECT template_key, COALESCE(NULLIF(template_name, ''), template_key) AS template_name",
    '  FROM public.email_templates',
    '  WHERE template_type = 2 AND is_active = true',
    "  ORDER BY COALESCE(NULLIF(template_name, ''), template_key)",
    ')',
    'SELECT',
    '  (SELECT row_to_json(summary) FROM summary) AS summary,',
    "  COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(to_jsonb(setting_rows)) FROM setting_rows), '[]'::json) AS setting_rows,",
    "  COALESCE((SELECT json_agg(to_jsonb(signature_rows)) FROM signature_rows), '[]'::json) AS signature_rows",
  ].join('\n');
}

return [{ json: { ...input, sql } }];
